241 G0300B_BAL_WLKG_CD G0300B_BAL_WLKG_CD G0300B Balance During Walking Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the resident's balance while walking (with assistive device if used). -=Not assessed/no information
0=Steady at all times
1=Not steady, but able to stabilize without human assistance
2=Not steady, only able to stabilize with human assistance
8=Activity did not occur
